name: @borjie/ai-reviewer
description: Veteran-expert AI reviewer for property-management workflows. Per-kind policies (parcel edits, polygon draws, metadata updates, photo adds, inspections, leases, maintenance, documents, POs, requisitions) combine deterministic pre-checks + red-line guards with a brain-port review for nuanced cases. Coaching layer surfaces hints on work-in-progress before submission. Pure ports; no IO.
